summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-9 through REQ-13) with reasonable completeness. Backend adds deleteFoodEntry, setCalorieLimit, and getCalorieLimit. Frontend adds delete buttons per entry, calorie limit editing with calories-remaining display, exceeded-limit warning banner, and a 7-day Recharts bar chart with reference line. All React Query hooks are present with proper query invalidation. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features are detected.
